mapper.sql: privateClassId, className, classType, classPrice, classTime, classDetail, validityDay, createdDate
mapper.select: select privateClassId, className, classType, classPrice, classTime, classDetail, validityDay,energy, createdDate from private_class where privateClassId = #{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into private_class (privateClassId, className, classType, classPrice, classDetail, validityDay, createdDate) values (#{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{classDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{validityDay,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into private_class
privateClassId,
className,
classType,
classPrice,
classDetail,
validityDay,
createdDate,
#{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{classDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{validityDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update private_class
className = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classType = #{classType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
classPrice = #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
classDetail = #{classDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
validityDay = #{validityDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where privateClassId = #{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update private_class set className = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classType = #{classType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, classPrice = #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, classDetail = #{classDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, validityDay = #{validityDay,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where privateClassId = #{privateClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT pc.privateClassId,ccs.classId,pc.className,pc.firstImgUrl,ccs.classFee FROM private_class pc LEFT JOIN coach_class_ship ccs ON pc.privateClassId = ccs.classId WHERE ccs.coachId = #{coachId}

SELECT pc.privateClassId,pc.className,pc.firstImgUrl,pc.classTime,pc.classDetail,ccs.lowestClass,concat(pc.classPrice,'') as classFee FROM private_class pc LEFT JOIN coach_class_ship ccs ON pc.privateClassId= ccs.classId WHERE ccs.coachId = #{coachId} AND pc.privateClassId = #{privateClassId}

select count(*) from private_class pc inner join data_map dm on dm.idxLabel=2 and dm.nextLabel=4 and dm.price=pc.classType where pc.privateClassId=#{privateClassId} and dm.dataName like concat('%','体验课','%')
